meaning: vbl.handwrite的过去分词 adj.手写的
examples: A brief, handwritten postscript lay beneath his signature.
The letter was handwritten, in a hasty, barely decipherable scrawl.
The machine can recognize handwritten characters and turn them into printed text.
People held up handwritten signs asking for donations of oxygen cylinders, drills and water bottles.
Among his handwritten entries are notes about Wimbledon's start date and his travel plans.
